title: VGR Professional Hair Clippers for Men – Cordless Taper Lever Clipper with Ceramic Blades, 7000 RPM Motor, USB-C Rechargeable, 250 Min Battery, Multiple Speeds
features: Professional hair cutting kit: Electric cordless hair clippers for men with eight guide combs at 1.5 mm, 3 mm, 4.5 mm, 6 mm, 10 mm, 13 mm, 16 mm and 19 mm plus oil, cleaning brush and USB C cable

Metal-coated ceramic blade: A cool-running blade on these professional cordless hair clippers gives smoother cuts with less irritation, while the taper lever lets you adjust from 0.8 mm to 2 mm for controlled men’s haircuts

Multi speed motor: These professional cordless hair clippers use a four speed motor at 5500, 6000, 6500 and 7000 rpm, letting you match the power to different hair types while keeping noise under 56 dB for a smoother trimming experience

LED display and travel lock: A clear LED screen shows battery level, speed and cleaning reminders, while the USB C rechargeable battery gives up to 250 minutes use and a travel lock prevents accidental activation
Versatile grooming use: Suitable for haircuts, fading, beard edging and detailing with consistent power for men’s grooming at home or in the barbershop

LED screen with Travel Lock Accurately displays the battery level, speed level, oiling reminder and travel lock status. Unlock or lock by holding the power button for 3 seconds. 250 Min. Reliable Battery Experience up to 250 minutes of use from 3.5 hrs charge via USB-C. Designed for numerous charging cycles, ensuring safety and preventing overheating. Multi-Speed Turbo Motor A motor with 4 adjustable speeds ranging from 5500 RPM to 7000 RPM. This motor can withstand frequent use, offering smooth operation and low noise. Metal-Coated Ceramic Blades Our unique blade technology combines the durability and toughness of stainless steel with the sharpness, smoothness and heat-free capability of ceramics. Adjustable Taper Lever Customize your cut with the adjustable taper lever, offering cutting lengths from 0.8 mm to 2.0 mm designed for durability, ease of use, smooth movement and consistent performance.
